六旬老太李丽华因为一场车祸重生了！
车祸后意识不清楚的她还是清楚的听到了孩子们的争吵。
大儿子：我是长子，家里的房子理应归我。 
大女儿：嘤嘤嘤，妈妈，嘤嘤嘤。 
小儿子：妈，你早点走，大家都轻松。要不然受伤这么严重也遭罪。 
李丽华含恨而终，再睁眼竟然回到了自己和老头子没分开的时候。 
李丽华对老头子：我们好好过到老。 
李丽华对小女儿：妈对不起你，妈会好好补偿你。 老两口化身战斗机，不管闲言碎语，老伴才是度过余生的那个人！ 
宠妻狂魔佟向阳：媳妇，我都听你的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/093c951e1af27dfee134a04bd68c2218~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夏日么m茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7595461329310207038","book_name":"重生九零：老太太抛弃不孝儿女！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595461333844247102","read_count":"457","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"322193"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"153","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家长里短,虐渣,重生,乡村,宠妻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/093c951e1af27dfee134a04bd68c2218~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400639&x-signature=ZkjId2Yx6d8ltIkGLP9R584%2F6kQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3404536664820189","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305571868AF6B9D907CDE39FD27"}"},"relate_info
